MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-05-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Howard B. Kim, Esq. of BURKE, WILLIAMS & SORENSEN 955-1160, for defendant Familian Plumbing Supply Corp., moving for judgment on pleadings
Stephen M. Fishback, Esq. of PAUL, HANLEY & HARLEY 510/559-9980, X-139, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
